final:
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input [15:0] d,
    output reg [15:0] q
);
  wire _tap_clk = clk & {1{1'b1}};


    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (reset)
            q <= 16'b0;  // Synchronous reset
        else
            q <= d;  // Load data
    end

endmodule
